overall.description: Gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 depicting a cowboy character in a white hat searching a supply chest at a misty forest campsite. The character discovers and examines a gold nugget before entering a canvas tent, showcasing the game's detailed third-person perspective and atmospheric lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: misty forest campsite with canvas tent and campfire

agents.ego_description: kneeling and rummaging through a wooden supply chest, searching for items

notable_agents.action: cowboy companion standing guard near the campfire, looking out at the wilderness

entered.detail: large canvas camping tent with wooden support poles, partially open flaps
open wooden crate with metal reinforcements containing supplies
smoldering fire with smoke rising, located near the tent entrance
dense pine trees and rocky outcrops shrouded in morning mist
uneven dirt and stone ground covering the campsite area

segments.scene_description: The character kneels at a wooden supply chest in a misty forest campsite, rummaging through contents while a companion stands guard nearby. A canvas tent stands in the background with smoke rising from a campfire, surrounded by dense pine trees and rocky terrain shrouded in fog.

scene_state.functional_zone: close-up examination of discovered object near riverbank

events.description: camera zooms in to first-person view of character's gloved hands holding a gold nugget

agents.ego_description: holding and inspecting a gold nugget in gloved hands, rotating it to examine from different angles

notable_agents.action: dark horse standing idle near the river water in the background

entered.detail: shiny gold nugget held between thumb and forefinger, reflecting light
dark colored horse standing near the water's edge
shallow river with visible stones and rippling water surface
green bushes and grasses growing along the riverbank

segments.scene_description: The camera shifts to an extreme close-up of the character's gloved hands holding a shiny gold nugget. A horse stands near the shallow river in the background as the character rotates the object to inspect it from different angles, with river vegetation visible along the banks.

scene_state.functional_zone: interior of canvas tent looking outward toward river

events.description: character enters the canvas tent, transitioning from outdoor campsite to interior space
lighting dims significantly as character moves into the shadowed tent interior

agents.ego_description: crawling into the canvas tent and settling inside, facing the opening

entered.detail: canvas walls of the tent interior, showing fabric texture and seams
triangular opening of the tent looking out toward the river and misty forest
bright natural light streaming in from outside, silhouetting the tent entrance

segments.scene_description: The character enters the canvas tent, transitioning from the misty outdoor campsite to the dimly lit interior. The view looks out through the tent's triangular opening toward the river and forest beyond, with bright exterior light streaming in and illuminating the fabric walls.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a misty forest campsite into the sheltered interior of a canvas tent. It begins with the character kneeling at a wooden supply chest amidst dense pine trees and rising campfire smoke, while a companion stands guard in the fog. As the character discovers a treasure, the camera shifts to an extreme close-up of gloved hands rotating a shiny gold nugget, with a horse and river vegetation visible in the soft background. The scene then transitions as the character moves away from the riverbank and enters the canvas tent, shifting from the hazy outdoor light to a dimly lit interior. Finally, the view settles inside the tent, looking back through the triangular opening toward the bright, misty forest and river beyond.
